name: Damage Control Training
briefing: Welcome to Damage Control Training. Practice dispatching repair teams to damaged ship sections, monitoring repair progress, and cancelling dispatch orders. Fast damage control keeps the ship operational.

nodes.text: Review interior damage status — identify areas needing repair
nodes.hint: The Damage Control panel shows the ship interior with room-level status. Damaged sections are highlighted. Repair teams (DCTs) are shown as icons. Scroll the panel to see all decks.

nodes.text: Dispatch a repair team to a damaged section
nodes.hint: Click on a room in the interior map, then select DISPATCH DCT. A repair team will move to that room and begin work. Each dispatch takes one DCT — you have a limited number, so prioritise critical areas.

nodes.text: Monitor the repair team's progress for 20 seconds
nodes.hint: Watch the room status update as repair progresses. Structural integrity rises while the DCT works. In combat, additional damage may arrive while teams are working — you may need to redirect teams.

nodes.text: Dispatch a second repair team and hold for 30 seconds
nodes.hint: Dispatch another team to a different room. Multiple teams working simultaneously speeds recovery. Keep teams away from areas where Security is operating — marine combat and repair work don't mix.
